transcript:
CALLER: Hello. My name is Prakash Datar. I had a scan appointment — uh, MRI — for this morning but I missed it. Can I reschedule?
AGENT: Hello Prakash ji. No worries. Let me check... yes, I see the MRI slot from this morning. We can reschedule that. Are you available this week still?
CALLER: Ideally Thursday or Friday. Mornings preferred.
AGENT: Thursday morning at 9:30 AM is open in the radiology department. Shall I book that?
CALLER: Yes please, Thursday 9:30 AM.
AGENT: Done. Prakash Datar, Thursday at 9:30 AM for the MRI. Please remember to follow any fasting or prep guidelines mentioned earlier. SMS on its way.
CALLER: Noted. Thanks a lot.
